title: Wellness & Patient Intake
description: A calm, soft multi-step wellness / patient intake form. Fully editable in MegaForm Builder. Centered single-column card with a top dot-progress stepper. Mint-white shell, emerald accent, pill-shaped inputs.

fields.label: Personal Details
fields.heading: Let’s start with the basics
fields.intro: Tell us a little about yourself so we can prepare for your visit.

fields.label: Health Background
fields.heading: Your health background
fields.intro: This helps your practitioner understand your history. All information stays confidential.

fields.label: How long have you had this concern?
Current Medications
fields.placeholder: List any medications and dosages you are currently taking…

fields.label: Lifestyle
fields.heading: A little about your lifestyle
fields.intro: Daily habits give us helpful context for your personalised plan.

fields.label: Average Hours of Sleep per Night
Appointment & Consent
fields.heading: Book & confirm
fields.intro: Choose a time that works for you and review the consent details before submitting.

fields.label: Anything else we should know?
fields.placeholder: Share any additional context for your practitioner…

fields.label: I consent to assessment and treatment by the clinic’s practitioners.
I have read and agree to the privacy policy regarding my health data.

customHtml:
Verdant Health

Patient Intake

A few gentle questions so we can care for you better. Takes about 3 minutes.

  1. 1 About You
  2. 2 Health
  3. 3 Lifestyle
  4. 4 Booking
